rules.title: Leech/E8/Golay Operational Lookup
rules.promote_now: Promote no-cost library lookup, code-chain, E8/Niemeier/Leech construction-surface claims when the lattice-forge API or receipt is named.
rules.bind_next: Attach exact lattice-forge API path, construction parameters, receipt JSON, and whether the claim is lookup, construction, or invariant-scope.
rules.residue: Expanded invariants, nontrivial glue-coset uniqueness, Gamma72, and physical interpretation remain separate dependencies.

rules.title: Symbolic Carrier Versus Physical Carrier
rules.promote_now: Promote addressable symbolic-carrier and transport claims where the paper names carrier, path, residue, or traversal rules.
rules.bind_next: Map every physical carrier phrase to a standard physics object, Hamiltonian/model, dataset, or calibration route before treating it as measured physics.
rules.residue: Physical identity, units, material constants, and measured transport remain calibration-bound.

rules.title: Electron-Hole-Exciton Standard Accounting
rules.promote_now: Treat hole, vacancy, exciton, recombination, screening, band-gap, and effective-mass language as standard-model correspondence when a material model is present.
rules.bind_next: Attach standard equations/citations and state what LCR adds: addressability, obligation routing, and residue bookkeeping.
rules.residue: Actual material behavior and quantitative exciton claims need a material model, units, and data.

rules.title: Spinor/SU(2) Double-Cover Local Semantics
rules.promote_now: Promote local 2pi sign-flip / 4pi return semantics where the O8/frame-inversion receipt is attached.
rules.bind_next: Bind the O8 receipt and cite standard SU(2)->SO(3) double-cover semantics as standard analogy/support.
rules.residue: Physical observer, quantum measurement, and empirical spin claims remain routed to observer/physics calibration.

rules.title: Finite CA And Bounded Search Promotion
rules.promote_now: Promote finite-state, bounded-search, local-rule, and exhaustive verification claims when the state space and transition law are explicit.
rules.bind_next: Attach state-space size, transition law, verifier name, receipt path, and bounded domain statement.
rules.residue: Unbounded Rule 30 prediction, global minimality, and all-game/all-system claims remain separate.

rules.title: Formal-Methods Receipt And Governance Closure
rules.promote_now: Promote claim-envelope, receipt, lane, causal-graph, and conformance obligations as formal-methods artifacts when standards reports are attached.
rules.bind_next: Attach NSIT standards report, content-addressed receipt, lane grant, replay path, and dependency graph row.
rules.residue: Missing hashes, missing schemas, or unrun adapters remain engineering residues, not mathematical openness.

rules.title: Applied Forge Internal/External Validation Split
rules.promote_now: Promote internal forge reader, descriptor, candidate-generation, and finite validation kernels when validators pass.
rules.bind_next: Attach forge tool path, input object, output descriptor/candidate, validator result, and explicit external-validation boundary.
rules.residue: Wet-lab, fabrication, biological, gameplay-global, or real-world optimization claims remain external-validation needs.

rules.title: CKM/Standard-Model Structural Transport Split
rules.promote_now: Promote SU(3)/D12/J3 face transport as structural algebraic transport when the finite receipt is attached.
rules.bind_next: Attach quark-face transport receipt and keep CKM/PDG numerical values as data-binding requirements.
rules.residue: Measured CKM agreement, physical-quark identity, and parameter calibration remain data-bound.

rules.title: Moonshine/VOA Finite Sector Split
rules.promote_now: Promote finite VOA sector, centroid-chain, and windowed sector claims when the receipt is attached.
rules.bind_next: Attach centroid/VOA receipt, finite sector count, and theorem/citation route for any moonshine identification.
rules.residue: Full Moonshine identity, McKay parity, and unbounded identification remain theorem/data-bound.

rules.title: Continuum Edge And Sampling-Stability Bridge
rules.promote_now: Promote discrete-continuous bridge claims only when the sample rule, norm, error bound, or counterexample policy is stated.
rules.bind_next: Attach sampling rule, interpolation/limit statement, norm, error bound, units, and boundary condition.
rules.residue: Loose continuum, GR, plasma, or energy language stays presentation-level until calibrated.

rules.title: Negative And Failed-Route Receipts As Guards
rules.promote_now: Use failed routes, rejected candidates, and boundary receipts as exclusion evidence and counterexample guards.
rules.bind_next: Attach negative receipt path, rejected candidate, failure mode, and the promotion it blocks.
rules.residue: A negative receipt constrains the claim; it does not prove the positive replacement unless separately evidenced.
